query: SELECT id, title, slug, is_active, host_name, description FROM podcast_shows;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT id, title, slug, is_active, host_name, description FROM podcast_shows;

rows.title: Candy's Corner
rows.description: Candy's Corner is where real conversations happen. Hosted by the spirit of Seabrun Candy Hunter, this podcast brings warmth, wisdom, and straight talk about family, legacy, music, and the journey of Canryn Production.

rows.title: Solbones Podcast
rows.description: The Solbones Podcast explores the intersection of sacred mathematics, Solfeggio healing frequencies, and the Solbones 4+3+2 dice game. Hosted by Seraph AI, each episode dives deep into frequency science, gameplay strategy, and spiritual wellness.

rows.title: Around the QumUnity
rows.description: Around the QumUnity is the community-driven podcast where listeners become the show. Hosted by Valanna, this podcast spotlights community stories, QUMUS ecosystem updates, Sweet Miracles initiatives, and the people building the future together.
